title: Big Wave Dave
overview: Big Wave Dave's is a sitcom that ran from August 9, 1993 until September 13, 1993. In it, three friends decide to drop everything and run a surf shop in Hawaii. When they arrive, they find out that it's not as easy as they thought. The show was produced by Levine & Isaacs Productions in association with Paramount Television.
creator: Ken Levine

episodes.title: Big Wave Dave's - Jane Kaczmarek, Adam Arkin
